title: docs: fix wrong directory path in agents-as-tools example README
body:
Type / Label
                                                                                                                                         
  bug                                                                                                                                    
  docs                                                                                                                                   
  good first issue                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                         
  Description                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                         
  ## Description                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                         
  The Agents as Tools example README contains an incorrect directory path.                                                               
                                                                                                                                         
  In `examples/08-agents-as-tools/README.md`, the setup instructions currently say:                                                      

  ```bash                                                                                                                                
  cd examples/09-agents-as-tools                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                         
  However, the actual directory in the repository is:                                                                                    

  examples/08-agents-as-tools                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                         
  There is no examples/09-agents-as-tools directory, so users following the README will hit a path error.                                
                                                                                                                                         
  ## Steps to reproduce                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                         
  1. Clone the repository.                                                                                                               
  2. Open examples/08-agents-as-tools/README.md.                                                                                         
  3. Follow the setup command:                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                         
  cd examples/09-agents-as-tools                                                                                                         

  4. The command fails because the directory does not exist.                                                                             
                                                                                                                                         
  ## Expected behavior                                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                         
  The README should point to the existing directory:                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                         
  cd examples/08-agents-as-tools                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                         
  ## Actual behavior                                                                                                                     

  The README points to a non-existent directory:                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                         
  cd examples/09-agents-as-tools                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                         
  ## Suggested fix                                                                                                                       

  Update both occurrences of:                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                         
  cd examples/09-agents-as-tools                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                         
  to:                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                         
  cd examples/08-agents-as-tools                                                                                                         

  ## Additional context                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                         
  This is a beginner-friendly documentation fix. I checked locally and confirmed:                                                        
                                                                                                                                         
  - examples/08-agents-as-tools exists                                                                                                   
  - examples/09-agents-as-tools does not exist

comments.body: I’d like to work on this. Assigning myself.

> I’d like to work on this. Assigning myself.

Assigned - thank u!
